2604.13717.title: An Empirical Investigation of Practical LLM-as-a-Judge Improvement Techniques on RewardBench 2
2604.13717.paper_summary: LLM-as-a-judge, using a language model to score or rank candidate responses, is widely used as a scalable alternative to human evaluation in RLHF pipelines, benchmarking, and application layer evaluations (evals). However, judgment reliability depends heavily on prompting and aggregation strategy. We present an empirical investigation of practical, drop-in techniques that improve GPT-5.4 judge accuracy on RewardBench 2 without any finetuning. Two techniques account for nearly all available gains: task-specific criteria injection (+3.0pp at negligible cost) and ensemble scoring (+9.8pp at 5x cost). Combined, they reach 83.6% accuracy, +11.9pp over the 71.7% baseline. Our investigation also covers three further techniques (calibration context, adaptive model escalation, and soft blending) which did not reliably improve on criteria + ensembling at comparable cost. Cheaper model tiers benefit disproportionately from ensembling: GPT-5.4 mini with k=8 achieves 79.2% at 1.2x baseline cost, and GPT-5.4 nano with k=8 reaches 71.4% at 0.4x baseline cost, making high-accuracy LLM judges accessible at low cost.
2604.13717.paper_summary_zh: LLM-as-a-judge，使用語言模型對候選回應進行評分或排名，已廣泛用作人類評估的可擴展替代方案，應用於RLHF管道、基準測試和應用層評估（evals）。然而，判斷的可靠性在很大程度上依賴於提示和聚合策略。我們提出了一項實證調查，研究了在不進行任何微調的情況下，改善GPT-5.4評判準確性的實用即插即用技術。兩種技術幾乎佔據了所有可用的增益：任務特定標準注入（+3.0pp，成本可忽略不計）和集成評分（+9.8pp，成本為5倍）。結合起來，它們達到了83.6%的準確率，比71.7%的基準提高了11.9個百分點。我們的調查還涵蓋了三種進一步的技術（校準上下文、自適應模型升級和軟混合），這些技術在可比較的成本下未能可靠地改善標準+集成的效果。較便宜的模型層級從集成中獲益不成比例：GPT-5.4 mini在k=8的情況下以1.2倍基準成本達到79.2%，而GPT-5.4 nano在k=8的情況下以0.4倍基準成本達到71.4%，使得高準確度的LLM評判在低成本下變得可及。
2604.13717.author: Ryan Lail et.al.
